rationale: Keep this pair because the citing paper explicitly frames branded apps as omnichannel customer-journey touchpoints and claims to extend customer-journey/omnichannel work, while the cited paper is a core multichannel customer migration study (catalog vs. Web) with mechanisms on channel use and marketing communications. Even though the raw match only provides a DOI (no local citation context), the conceptual overlap suggests the cited work could be foundational rather than an incidental mention.
